description: Tolerances for comparing Agent Teams vs parallel-subagents fallback outcomes on PRSG-014 stack-manager guidance.

stack_manager.supported.rationale: Supported gh-stack guidance must require the same version, read-only proof, packet, and topology checks across orchestration paths.

stack_manager.fallback.rationale: Fallback guidance must keep explicit gh commands before any gh-stack mutation across both paths.

stack_manager.blocked.rationale: Partial or unknown gh-stack mutation must block without manager mixing in both paths.

stack_manager.recovery.rationale: Resume guidance must require the same decision, topology, PR identity, base/head ref, head SHA, and packet revalidation.

stack_manager.shared_script.rationale: Claude Code and Codex guidance must point to the same shared detector script.

stack_manager.shared_contract.rationale: Claude Code and Codex guidance must point to the same shared decision schema.
